details.request: Explain what the remaining local branch task/TASK-20260427-092 is and why it was flagged for manual review.

spec.objective: Inspect the residual local task branch and summarize why it remains.
success_criteria: Identify whether the branch exists locally.
Compare it with main using commit and tree evidence.
Explain why automated cleanup kept it.
Avoid deleting or modifying the branch unless explicitly requested.

details.branch_omission_reason: Read-only explanatory inspection; no file changes other than task ledger entry.

checks.name: ledger_review
checks.evidence: TASK-20260427-092 ledger says cleanup was retained because git branch -d refused after squash merge under the old cleanup policy.

checks.name: squash_comparison
checks.evidence: main contains squash commit 2b907f8 [TASK-20260427-092] Define isolated Claude Generator handoff; branch tip is ee07c3a with the same subject.

checks.name: manual_review_reason
checks.evidence: git diff 2b907f8..task/TASK-20260427-092 shows only logs/tasks/TASK-20260427-092.jsonl and reports/TASK-20260427-092.md differ, so automated tree-equivalence cleanup retained the branch.

details.summary: Explained that task/TASK-20260427-092 is an old completed task branch retained after squash merge because its tree is not identical to the main squash commit due to metadata/report formatting differences.
details.merge_omission_reason: Read-only explanatory inspection; no branch merge required.
details.quality_score_skipped_reason: Tier 1 read-only explanation; no guide or product change.

insight_capture.reason: Existing CURRENT_STATE.md already tracks the residual branch for manual review.
